title: Sand White Balloons 140pcs Beige Balloon Arch Garland Kit 5/10/12/18 Inch Different Size Cream Balloons for Graduation Baby Shower Wedding Birthday Party Anniversary Decorations
features: VALUABLE PACK:The Ivory White balloon garland includes 140 pcs cream balloons,You will receive 77 5" Balloons + 30 10" Balloons + 30 12" Balloons + 3 18" Balloons-Ivory White,1 Ribbon,1 Balloon Tape Strips,100 Point Glues.Add these vibrant and unique cream balloons to your party for the perfect decoration.These Ivory White balloons will make an impressive and memorable party sparkle.

PREMIUM QUALITY PARTY BALLOONS: Ivory White balloons of each size are heavier than normal balloons. Ivory White balloons of different sizes are made of natural latex, harmless and non-toxic, and safe to be used as balloon decor for an birthday party. They are much more durable than regular balloons, which can remain a good shape for a long time after inflation, so you don't have to worry about them popping before the party is over.

GREAT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Ivory White party balloons are incredible party decorations in party supplies. You can make the Ivory White balloons into a balloons garland arch or mix and match with other colors, 83pack Ivory White balloons arch is perfect for wedding, bridal shower, baby shower, birthday party, engagement party, gender reveal balloons and so on. These Ivory White matte balloons garland surely shine your impressive and memorable party.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE IVORY WHITE BALLOONS ARCH: This decorative set features 140 Ivory White latex balloons, mixed sizes of Ivory White balloons that fill with air and helium and last for hours. We offer ribbon as a freebie, easy to tie, and using it will save time and effort, which can help you make party decorations easier. You can even make a perfect Ivory White balloon garland arch from balloons of different sizes, Just let them make your party even more unique, and it will be unforgettable.

CUSTOMER SERVICE GUARENTEE: The color of Ivory White balloons will be an individual difference before and after the balloons are inflated. When you get these helium Ivory White balloons, if you are not satisfy with party balloons or balloons is damaged, you can contact us at any time to get refund of balloons or brand new Ivory White balloons for party replacement.
